steps.title: Identify the research finding
steps.content: The passage emphasizes one central finding: combining sellers' own data with social media information dramatically improves forecast accuracy.

steps.title: Match the finding to the choices
steps.content:
A directly captures the research finding: using multiple data sources enhances sellers' ability to anticipate demand.

The other choices either overstate media's transformative role, misplace the main concern, or omit a key data source.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
